verse_text: Thus says the Lord Almighty: 'You looked for much, but little came, and when it was brought into the house I blew it away, because My house is desolate while each one of you hurries to his own house;

pericope.title: The Command to Rebuild the Lord's House

links.context: The temple will be rebuilt, but not as it was before. The second temple, not as glorious, was completed in approximately 515 BC (see [[HAG.1:1]]-15).
